title: Create /onboarding/tenant step 2 (budget, date, bedrooms)
description: Create step 2 of tenant onboarding — budget range, move-in date, and bedroom count.
acceptance_criteria: Page heading: 'Tell us what you need'
Budget: two number inputs (Min £ / Max £) or a dual-handle range slider
Move-in date: a date input (type=date), label 'Earliest move-in'
Bedrooms: a select or button group (Studio, 1, 2, 3, 4+)
A 'Finish setup' button is always enabled (all fields optional at this step)

steps.details:
let selectedBedrooms = null;
document.querySelectorAll('.bedroom-btn').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { document.querySelectorAll('.bedroom-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('selected')); btn.classList.add('selected'); selectedBedrooms = parseInt(btn.dataset.val); }); });

technical_notes: Finish button click handler and Supabase write are in TASK-033.
